source_commit: 32abc0f task6-ddr3: correct v110 source7/source8 summary signatures
interpretation: DFII-only mode still reproduces the same high-level failure (init_done true, pll_locked false, init_error true, probe timeout). No native writes are observed by definition, yet timeout remains with dfii_seq_state at IDLE and response counters at zero. This is strong evidence that route/clock/reset health or the DFII completion condition, not the native path, is the current blocker.
next_action: Do not add native-path work next. Capture an early INIT/PLL telemetry artifact and compare against a clean baseline (pre-native experiments) before changing PHY or write queue logic. Candidate next experiment: enable only DFII status/status2 debug outputs and run dedicated init-liveness checks without addrwalk.
